project_type: Python Telegram monitoring system with Telethon userbot, python-telegram-bot, FastAPI dashboard, Flask trap server, and APScheduler
test_framework: pytest with pytest-asyncio, asyncio_mode=auto in pytest.ini, tests in anti_stalker_pro/tests/
verification_instructions: 1. Install dependencies with pip install -r requirements.txt. 2. Run pytest tests/ -v and confirm all pass. 3. Run python -c 'import main' to validate imports work without runtime errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access. Python 3.11 available via pyenv. No actual Telegram credentials available so cannot do runtime integration test.
key_patterns: Singleton TelethonClient, async generators for DB sessions ('async for session in get_session()'), pydantic-settings for config, APScheduler for periodic tasks, SQLAlchemy 2.0 async ORM with DeclarativeBase
directory_structure: anti_stalker_pro/ contains: core/ (config, db, models, logger, exceptions), userbot/ (client, story/online/group/message/contact trackers), intelligence/ (scorer, patterns, anomaly, profiler, predictor, timeline), trapnet/ (flask server, fingerprinter, honeypot, geolocator), bot/ (handler, notifier, alert_manager, report_generator, keyboards), dashboard/ (FastAPI app, auth, routes/), scheduler/ (task_manager, tasks), storage/ (cache, backup, export), tests/, main.py
